## Acceptance criteria

     Bad: "the form works". Good: "POST /v1/users with an empty email → 400". -->

## Blocked by

## Service / area
<!-- auth / users / frontend / shared. One task = one zone, so agents don't collide. -->


## Out of scope
<!-- What NOT to touch. Guards against scope creep and reviewer over-engineering. "—" is fine. -->
